actions.action: Use execute_windows_command to launch VS Code (via Start menu or desktop icon).
actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if launching VS Code fails in the future.

recipe.steps: Instruct the user’s machine to open Visual Studio Code by calling the internal automation tool for executing Windows commands. Provide instructions such as launching VS Code via the Start menu or clicking the desktop icon.

actions.action: Use execute_windows_command to click “File → Open Folder…”, then select Documents/CalculatorApp in the file picker GUI.
actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if opening the folder fails in the future.

recipe.steps: Within Visual Studio Code, invoke the menu path 'File' → 'Open Folder…' and, when prompted by the file picker GUI, select the appropriate folder (e.g., Documents/CalculatorApp). Complete the action by confirming the selection in the dialog.

actions.action: Use execute_windows_command to right-click in the Explorer pane on src/, choose “New File”, and name it calculator_app.py.
actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if creating the new file fails in the future.

recipe.steps: Right-click on the src/ folder in the VS Code Explorer pane, select 'New File' from the context menu, and name the new file appropriately.

actions.action: Use execute_windows_command to click into the editor pane and type (or paste) the minimal CLI calculator code (+, –, *, /).
actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if entering or pasting the code fails in the future.

recipe.steps: Click into the editor pane of the opened file in VS Code, and type or paste in the minimal Python CLI calculator code that supports +, -, *, and / operations.

actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if saving the file fails in the future.

recipe.steps: In Visual Studio Code, click the 'File' menu at the top, then select and click the 'Save' option to save the currently open file.

actions.action: Use execute_windows_command to click the Run icon in the VS Code activity bar, select “Run Python File” in the GUI dropdown, targeting calculator_app.py.
actions.fallback_action: Notify the user if running the Python file fails in the future.

recipe.steps: In Visual Studio Code, click the Run icon in the activity bar. Next, in the dropdown, select 'Run Python File' to execute calculator_app.py.
